definitions.text: To perceive or detect someone or something with the eyes, or as if by sight. To witness or observe by personal experience.
examples: I'm seeing much better since I got my eyeglasses recalibrated.

definitions.text: To witness or observe by personal experience.
examples: I'm seeing much better since I got my eyeglasses recalibrated.

definitions.text: To watch (a movie) at a cinema, or a show on television etc.
examples: I saw the latest Tarantino flick last week.
See, in order to win the full prize we would have to come up with a scheme to land a rover on the Moon.

definitions.text: A diocese or archdiocese: a region of a church, generally headed by a bishop or an archbishop.
Alternative form of cee; the name of the Latin script letter C/c.
